entities.name: ADOLESCENT GIRLS
entities.description: Adolescent girls from indigenous communities in Telangana, India, aged 11-18 years

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where the study was conducted

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: State in India where the study sites were located

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition of deficiency or excess in nutrient intake affecting indigenous populations

entities.name: STUNTING
entities.description: A chronic form of malnutrition characterized by low height-for-age

entities.name: THINNESS
entities.description: A nutritional indicator of chronic malnutrition

entities.name: UNDERNUTRITION
entities.description: A state of insufficient nutrient intake

entities.name: TRADITIONAL AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural methods relied upon by indigenous populations

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: Economic hardship contributing to malnutrition risk

entities.name: ILLITERACY
entities.description: Lack of education contributing to malnutrition risk

entities.name: LOW PERSONAL AND ENVIRONMENTAL HYGIENE
entities.description: Poor sanitary conditions contributing to malnutrition

entities.name: CROSS-SECTIONAL STUDY
entities.description: A study design used to investigate the incidence and determinants of malnutrition

entities.name: MIXED-METHODS APPROACH
entities.description: A data collection method combining quantitative and qualitative data

entities.name: LOGISTIC REGRESSIONS
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify factors influencing nutritional status

entities.name: EDUCATION OF HEAD OF HOUSEHOLD
entities.description: The educational level of the household leader, which influences nutritional outcomes

entities.name: EDUCATION OF ADOLESCENT GIRL
entities.description: The educational level of the girl, which influences nutritional outcomes

entities.name: TOILET INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Availability of sanitary facilities in households

entities.name: SOCIOCULTURAL NORMS
entities.description: Cultural beliefs and practices influencing diet and marriage age

entities.name: STARCHY STAPLES
entities.description: Food items considered most important in the diet according to sociocultural norms

entities.name: EARLY AGE OF MARRIAGE
entities.description: The practice of marrying at a young age, influencing nutritional status
